© 2023 - MicroPets

MicroPets MIGRATION

Migration & $1000 Airdrop

Dear community, We're excited to launch our new Migration & $1000 Airdrop,every holder will be able to claim $1000 after migrating successfully" inspired by the Bald Eagle, symbolizing our project's commitment and resilience. With your support, we've risen like a Phoenix, and this collection reflects our strength and unity.

We're grateful for your unwavering support, and together, we'll continue to grow and thrive in the NFT world. Explore our 8 unique items, ranging from Common to Mythic, each representing a vibrant Petropolis lands.

After 4 months of dedicated design work, this is our most exclusive MicroPets collection yet. Thank you for being part of this incredible journey.

Warm regards,
MicroPets Team ♥️

Claim $1000 Airdrop!

Price: Connect Wallet
